title: IIT Gandhinagar – Project Associate I – 2 Posts
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Project Associate I. Candidates with B.C.A/B.Sc, B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 13-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT Gandhinagar official website.

basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Project Associate I. Candidates with B.C.A/B.Sc, B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 13-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT Gandhinagar official website.

qualification.education_qualification: B.C.A/B.Sc. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 04 years of post qualification experience, B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc. or equivalent in any discipline, Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026
